scripts.build:css: for f in assets/css/*.css; do case "$f" in *.min.css) continue;; esac; npx cleancss -o "${f%.css}.min.css" --source-map "$f"; done && echo 'CSS minified.'
scripts.build:js: for f in assets/js/*.js; do case "$f" in *.min.js) continue;; esac; npx terser "$f" -o "${f%.js}.min.js" --compress --mangle --source-map "url='$(basename ${f%.js}.min.js.map)'"; done && echo 'JS minified.'
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
scripts.setup-hooks: git config core.hooksPath .githooks && echo 'Git hooks configured.'
